description: Grouped automerge for all non-major updates. Extend AFTER default.json. Skip in repos that need stricter review.

packageRules.description: Bundle every non-major update into a single weekly PR and automerge once CI passes. Do NOT add lockFileMaintenance here: it is repo-wide (no package/datasource), so this groupName would concatenate onto its title ('lock file maintenance all non-major dependencies') and force it onto this shared weekly branch despite its own mon/wed/fri/sun schedule. It already automerges standalone via default.json's lockFileMaintenance block.
